checklistName: Post PR234 Private Local Operation Safety Check
operationPolicy: Private Local first; private-local.html, index.html, and local browser confirmation remain the operating basis after PR #234 main pull.
safetyPolicy: Home PC safe continuation proceeds only after PR #234 merged main, latest branch, and clean working tree are confirmed.
cleanMainPolicy: Phase21-40 starts from clean main before moving to the next Phase.
branchCleanupPolicy: Branch deletion is allowed only after merge confirmation, and main sync is required after merge.
securitySoftwarePolicy: Norton and security-software friendly operation; no hidden updater, auto-run launcher, suspicious background execution, or dangerous launcher extension changes.
devicePolicy: Home PC continues safe private local operation; iPad remains view / confirmation only.
prMergePolicy: No direct commit to main; feature branch and Draft PR are required; merge only after user confirmation.

postPr234MergeChecks.label: PR #234 merged confirmation is required before using main as the baseline.
Phase21-39 main reflection is confirmed after pull.

homePcSafetyChecks.label: Home PC main branch latest confirmation is required.
Working tree clean confirmation is required before next Phase work.
Local browser confirmation is required for private-local.html and index.html.

branchPrMergeChecks.label: Feature branch is required for follow-up work.
Branch deletion only after merge confirmation.

privateLocalChecks.label: Security software friendly operation remains required.

blockedAutomationChecks.label: No suspicious auto-run script is added.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

operationPrinciples: PLAN_ONLY / Protected / Draft PR first / merge only after user confirmation remains unchanged.
private-local.html and index.html remain the manual local entry points.
GitHub Pages and public delivery are not required.
Home PC safe continuation is recorded from PR #234 merged latest main and a clean working tree.
Phase21-40 starts from clean main before the next Phase proceeds.
Branch deletion only after merge confirmation and main sync required after merge.
Security software friendly operation avoids auto-update, auto-run, hidden updater, and suspicious background execution.
nextRecommendedStep: Proceed to the next Phase only after PR #234 main latest, clean working tree, branch cleanup policy, private-local.html, and index.html local browser confirmation are complete.
